text:
<start_of_turn>user
You are a specialist legal AI. Identify all parties to this contract.

CONTRACT EXCERPT:
This Agreement is entered into as of January 1, 2024, between Acme Corp ('Company') and John Doe ('Consultant').
<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
The parties to this contract are: (1) Acme Corp, referred to as 'Company', and (2) John Doe, referred to as 'Consultant'.
<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
You are a specialist legal AI. Extract the indemnification clause in full.

CONTRACT EXCERPT:
Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from any claims, damages, losses, and expenses arising out of or relating to such party's breach of this Agreement.
<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Indemnification Clause: Each party agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party and its affiliates from any third-party claims, damages, losses, and reasonable legal expenses arising from: (a) breach of this Agreement; (b) gross negligence or willful misconduct.
<end_of_turn>
